intro: Urostigma pilosum, also known as Uva pilosula, is a species of flowering plant in the nettle family (Urticaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which may help in alleviating conditions like fever, digestive issues, and skin irritations. The bioactive constituents of Urostigma pilosum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Urostigma pilosum is commonly used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being incorporated into topical creams and ointments for its skin-soothing and anti-inflammatory effects.
